description: Build persistent notification center with unread controls, filtering, and clear-read actions.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state persisted so that read and unread status remains across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add persistent fields to store notification read state and read timestamp per user-notification record
Existing notifications default to unread when read state is missing
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Provide notification center queries with unread count
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification center data and unread totals so that the UI can display list content and badge counts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add query to fetch user notifications with read state and ordering by newest first
Add query or aggregate field to return unread notification count for current user
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement mark read and mark unread actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I control what remains in my unread queue.
acceptanceCriteria: Expose mutation to set read state for a notification owned by current user
Marking read updates read timestamp; marking unread clears read timestamp
Unread count is recalculated after successful read-state mutation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification list panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and notification list UI so that I can quickly see and open notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Header or nav shows unread badge count from notification query
Opening notification center displays notification list with read/unread visual state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notification list by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notification list by read state so that I can focus on unread or previously handled items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center includes filter options All, Unread, and Read
Selected filter updates displayed list without losing read-state indicators
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that the list keeps focus on items that still need attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide action to remove or archive all read notifications for current user only
Notification center updates list and unread badge after clear-read action
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
